description_long: This is a black over-ear wireless headset with a padded headband and large cushioned ear cups, designed for comfort during extended use. The headset features an adjustable microphone boom on one side, which can be positioned close to the mouth for clear voice transmission. The ear cups are circular and have a glossy finish with subtle branding visible on the headband. Accompanying the headset is a small USB dongle, likely for wireless connectivity to computers or other devices. The overall design is sleek and modern, with minimal visible buttons or controls, suggesting touch or discreet button operation. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some metal reinforcements and synthetic padding for the headband and ear cups.
description: A sleek black wireless headset with cushioned ear cups, adjustable microphone boom, and a USB dongle for connectivity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full headset with both ear cups, headband, microphone boom, and the USB dongle below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cup, the microphone boom extended forward, and the USB dongle to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the ear cups and headband, with the microphone less visible and no branding apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the 'Intelbras' branding on the headband, the microphone boom, and the USB dongle to the right.
